headline: Thinking of Buying a Rental Property? Consider These Five Proven Alternatives
summary: One of the most tried and true ways to build wealth is by investing in real estate. Real estate can be an effective investment to hedge inflation, provide tax benefits and pass down wealth to heirs. Having a rental property can provide monthly cash flow, and the home’s value may appreciate over time.
